description.en: The China Coal Industry Association (CCIA) is the national trade organization representing China's coal mining, washing, and processing sector—the world's largest coal industry by output. Operating under the supervision of the National Development and Reform Commission, CCIA serves as the primary source of official coal industry statistics in China. The association publishes monthly and annual data on raw coal production, coal sales volumes, ex-mine price indices, import and export volumes, fixed asset investment in the sector, and occupational safety indicators. China accounts for approximately half of global coal production, making CCIA data essential for global energy markets, commodity forecasting, environmental policy analysis, and industrial carbon accounting.
description.zh: 中国煤炭工业协会（中煤协）是代表中国煤炭开采、洗选和加工行业的全国性行业组织，主管单位为国家发展和改革委员会。中国是全球最大的煤炭生产国，约占全球产量的一半，中煤协因此成为官方煤炭行业统计数据的主要来源。协会发布原煤产量、煤炭销售量、出矿价格指数、进出口量、行业固定资产投资及职业安全指标等月度和年度数据，是全球能源市场、大宗商品预测、环境政策分析和工业碳核算的重要参考依据。

en: Monthly raw coal production: national total and breakdown by province, mine type (state-owned, private), and coal category (thermal, coking, anthracite)
Coal sales volume and inventory: monthly ex-mine sales volumes, stockpile levels at mines and major power plants
Ex-mine price indices: monthly Bohai-Rim Steam Coal Price Index (BSPI) and coking coal benchmark prices by region
Coal trade statistics: monthly import and export volumes by country of origin/destination and coal type
Fixed asset investment: quarterly capital expenditure in coal mining and washing sector by region
Occupational safety data: monthly fatal accident counts, death tolls, and safety incident reports by province and mine type
Industry economic performance: quarterly revenue, profit, losses, and cost data for coal enterprises above designated size
Coal washing and processing: annual capacity and output of coal preparation plants
Annual China Coal Industry Report: comprehensive review of supply, demand, prices, trade, safety, and policy outlook
zh: 月度原煤产量：全国总量及按省份、矿山性质（国有、私营）和煤种（动力煤、炼焦煤、无烟煤）的分类数据
煤炭销售量与库存：月度出矿销售量、矿山及主要电厂存煤量
出矿价格指数：月度环渤海动力煤价格指数（BSPI）及各地区炼焦煤基准价格
煤炭贸易统计：按来源地/目的地和煤种分类的月度进出口量
固定资产投资：按地区分类的煤炭开采和洗选行业季度资本支出
安全生产数据：月度死亡事故起数、死亡人数及各省、各类型矿山安全事故报告
行业经济运行：规模以上煤炭企业季度营业收入、利润总额、亏损额和成本数据
煤炭洗选加工：选煤厂年度产能和产量数据
中国煤炭工业年度报告：供需、价格、贸易、安全生产和政策展望的综合述评
